# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying over it, introducing a collaboration between Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI. It then transitions to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, emphasizing the importance of high-quality data and describing the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveforms and shots of data centers, highlighting the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video shifts to showcasing the Flight Simulator game environment, featuring detailed and realistic aerial views of landscapes, castles, and planes in flight. This segment visually demonstrates the immersive experience of the simulator, highlighting the high fidelity and realism of the graphics and environment.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The focus returns to the neural TTS technology, with a discussion on the high fidelity of cognitive services offerings that produce voices sounding much more like actual human voices. The segment concludes with a realistic airport scene showing an airplane on the tarmac, ground crew directing the plane, and a pilot communicating with ground control, illustrating the integration of natural voice technology in aviation communication.
